title: Hornet Removal in Yorkville, Manhattan | $350 - $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Yorkville, Manhattan. Safe, effective wasp and hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving the Upper East Side. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to residents and visitors in Yorkville, Manhattan, especially around the neighborhood's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic brownstones. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Yorkville, from East End Avenue to Lexington Avenue. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests, protecting your family, pets, and property from these aggressive stinging insects.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Yorkville residents for years with prompt, reliable hornet removal services. Our team understands the unique architecture of Yorkville's prewar buildings and townhouses, allowing us to safely access and remove nests from even the most challenging locations while protecting your property.
localContext: Yorkville's tree-canopied streets, riverside parks near Carl Schurz Park, and classic brownstones create ideal nesting spots for hornets, particularly during spring and summer months. The neighborhood's mix of residential buildings, outdoor cafes along Second and Third Avenues, and proximity to the East River greenway means hornet activity can disrupt daily life and outdoor enjoyment for Upper East Side residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Yorkville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Yorkville, Manhattan. Given the aggressive nature of hornets, we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for urgent situations. Our technicians come fully equipped to safely eliminate the nest on the first visit.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height (ground level vs. second story or higher).

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Yorkville apartment buildings and brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests in Yorkville's classic architecture, including under eaves, in wall voids, attic spaces, and around balconies of both brownstones and high-rise buildings. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to Carl Schurz Park also attract hornets, who build aerial nests in tree branches and building overhangs.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Yorkville home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family and pets during hornet removal. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during treatment, and the treated area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after service completion.
